title: Resource Exhaustion via Malicious Input
description: The system is vulnerable to denial-of-service attacks if it processes large or malformed inputs that consume excessive server resources (CPU, memory, bandwidth). This can lead to the system becoming unresponsive or crashing.
attack_vector: Sending crafted requests with oversized payloads, complex queries, or requests that trigger resource-intensive operations.
mitigations: Implement input validation and sanitization to limit the size and complexity of user-supplied data.
Rate limiting to restrict the number of requests from a single IP address.
Employ a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious requests.
